title: LG Soft India Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: LG Soft India Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India Holdings Services:
LG Soft India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India Holdings Services!
